title: Compendium Browser — Black Flag / Tales of the Valiant (ToV)
description: A compendium browser for Black Flag Roleplaying (Tales of the Valiant). Browse spells, items, monsters, classes, lineages, heritages, talents, and more with rich filtering. Supports multi-select and compendium source configuration. Ported from the dnd5e built-in compendium browser.
